summary: Applied two surgical seam edits: strengthened Chapter 6-to-7 carryover by echoing Elsie's tap pattern in the opening beat, and strengthened Chapter 7-to-8 handoff by seeding Elsie's blue-enamel saucepan (with carrot-turnip mash) as an object Noreen delays returning.
edits: Added opening-line continuity detail referencing Elsie's 'two taps, pause, one' warning from the prior chapter.
Added late-chapter object continuity line placing Elsie's blue-enamel saucepan on Noreen's draining board with mash residue.
Compared opening construction against adjacent boundary opening; structure was already distinct, so no full opening scaffold rewrite was needed.
Confirmed style_bible.json contains no verbatim `example_lines` entries requiring replacement.
